overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game, showing a character exploring a misty river canyon with a large concrete dam and waterfall. The character walks along the shore, crosses the river, and climbs rocky terrain in a cinematic, overcast environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverside meadow with waterfall view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy riverbank toward the distant waterfall and dam structure

entered.detail: large concrete dam with water cascading down the center, visible in the distance at the end of the canyon
calm turquoise river flowing alongside the path
steep grey rock face forming the left canyon wall
tall evergreen trees scattered along the canyon walls
grassy and dirt path along the river edge with small rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, open riverside path with grassy banks. A large concrete dam with a waterfall is visible in the distance at the end of the canyon. The environment is overcast with mist rising from the water, and pine trees line the rocky cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing canyon approach to the dam

events.description: terrain transitions from grassy meadow to rocky shore as the canyon walls close in

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path becomes rockier and the canyon narrows, approaching the dam

entered.detail: steep rock wall appearing on the right side as the canyon narrows
faster moving water with white foam as the river approaches the dam

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows as the character approaches the dam. The grassy bank gives way to rocky gravel terrain, and the right canyon wall becomes visible. The waterfall grows larger in the frame as the distance closes, and the river becomes more turbulent.

events.description: character enters the river and begins wading through the current toward the opposite bank
character climbs out of the water onto the rocky left bank

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and crossing to the other side, fighting the current near the dam

entered.detail: rocks visible beneath the surface of the water in the river crossing

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the current, crossing from the right bank to the left. The water is clear with visible rocks beneath the surface. After crossing, the character climbs out onto the rocky left bank, continuing toward the dam.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail ascending the canyon wall

events.description: character begins climbing the steep rocky slope away from the river level

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky path on the left bank, gaining elevation above the river while moving toward the dam

entered.detail: steep rocky path climbing up the left canyon wall
vertical rock wall on the right side of the narrow canyon

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character ascends a steep rocky trail on the left canyon wall. The river falls away to the left and below, while the massive dam structure looms ahead and to the left. The path becomes steeper and more rugged as the character climbs higher.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, misty riverside path that gradually ascends into a rugged climb toward a massive concrete dam. It begins with the character walking along grassy banks under an overcast sky, with pine trees lining the cliff walls and a distant waterfall visible at the canyon's end. As the canyon narrows, the grassy terrain shifts to rocky gravel and the river becomes more turbulent, bringing the looming dam and its waterfall into sharper focus. The scene then transitions as the character wades through the clear, rocky current to cross the river, before turning toward the left bank to begin a steep ascent. Finally, the camera follows the character up a rugged trail on the canyon wall, leaving the river below as the massive structure of the dam dominates the horizon.
